title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: langchain-ai/langchain (Ollama integration)
summary: LangChain LLM interface for Ollama, enabling Retrieval-Augmented Generation and agentic workflows with local models.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama’s REST API; install from PyPI as ‘ollama’.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; published on npm as ‘ollama’.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with model management, chat history, and multi-user support.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight React-based GUI for chatting with Ollama models in the browser.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Interactive CLI chat wrapper for Ollama with conversation persistence and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store for question-answering over documents.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host Discord bot that routes user prompts to a local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command for chatting with local models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker Compose stack bundling Ollama server and WebUI for quick local clusters.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into inline code copilots with autocomplete and explain features.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama published to Maven Central; supports chat, embeddings, and listing models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaEmbedder nodes for building local NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community .NET SDK for Ollama with async chat, embeddings, and model management; NuGet package ‘OllamaSharp’.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing typed bindings to Ollama’s REST endpoints with Tokio async support.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama sidecar containers in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-rag-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that builds a local vector index of your vault and lets you query it via Ollama models.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for building and running Ollama deterministically on NixOS with CUDA or CPU backends.
